prompt: We're getting intermittent 429 errors from Azure Service Bus in our .NET worker service. Research how the retry policies work — what's the default retry behavior, how do we configure exponential backoff, and are there any known issues with the latest Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus SDK?

assertions.text: Describes the default retry policy (count, delay, mode)
Shows ServiceBusRetryOptions or ServiceBusClientOptions configuration code
Addresses 429 throttling behavior and how retries handle it
